title: houstonia rigidiuscula
intro: Houstonia rigidiuscula, also known as the stiff twinflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, with potential uses in treating various health conditions, including wounds and respiratory issues. The plant is said to possess health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. Houstonia rigidiuscula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
